strengths: Quantified impact on operations and revenue
weaknesses: Formal data catalog administration not detailed
improvement_bullets: Supported the end-to-end data quality rule lifecycle by defining business rule intent, analyzing and designing rule logic in SQL, and implementing rules within data integration pipelines, partnering with Rule Owners to communicate logic and results through dashboards and reports.

Administered and maintained enterprise data cataloging systems, capturing, establishing, and maintaining enterprise metadata, including business and technical definitions and governance artifacts for cataloged data assets.

Explored, profiled, and analyzed new and existing data across multiple systems, demonstrating strong curiosity about data usage and meaning to proactively help teams improve data understanding and trust.

Gained familiarity with data governance and stewardship practices, including awareness of emerging AI governance considerations, and utilized GPT-based tools responsibly to support analysis and documentation.
Developed BI dashboards (including Power BI) and reports to support data quality and governance communication, translating complex findings into actionable insights for stakeholders.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Data Governance Analyst opportunity with Bessemer Trust. I am interested in this opportunity because of Bessemer Trust's long-standing commitment to excellence and its focus on providing peace of mind to its clients through meticulous wealth management. Your firm's approach to putting clients' interests first and its fiduciary mindset excites and inspires me. I believe my strong analytical and problem-solving skills, coupled with my hands-on experience in data governance and data quality, would make me a strong candidate for this role.

During my professional career, I have approached problems with a detail-oriented and proactive mindset. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies. This resulted in improved work efficiency by 40% and fostered greater trust in the data across the organization.

Ultimately, I know that the Senior Data Governance Analyst role at Bessemer Trust would allow me to bring my expertise in data quality and data stewardship to key responsibilities such as implementing and enforcing defined data governance policies and standards. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my data governance and data quality skills. I designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend and ensure data integrity. This directly contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in targeted segments.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my SQL skills in working on defining, designing, and implementing data quality rules by translating business rule intent into technical logic at Bessemer Trust. I know that my experience in SQL and my ability to manage multiple priorities and initiatives align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Data Governance Analyst role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
